# MetaCode | Future Digital Solutions - Premium Tech Agency

> MetaCode is a premium tech agency based in India, specializing in high-performance web development, strategic branding, and custom digital solutions using cutting-edge technologies like React 19, Three.js, and GSAP.

MetaCode is a premium tech agency in India delivering web development, branding, and custom digital solutions for modern businesses.

## Company Overview
- **Focus:** Web development, branding, and custom digital solutions
- **Industries:** Technology
- **Geography:** India
- **Expertise:** Strong emphasis on innovation and tailored solutions for modern digital needs

## Core Features/Services
- [Homepage](https://metacode.co.in/): Discover MetaCode's premium tech offerings and innovative solutions.
- [About Us](https://metacode.co.in/about): Learn about our mission, values, and commitment to delivering quality tech solutions.
- [Services](https://metacode.co.in/services): Explore our diverse range of services, including web development and branding.
- [Works](https://metacode.co.in/works): View our portfolio showcasing successful projects and impactful designs.
- [Feedback](https://metacode.co.in/feedback): Read testimonials and share your experience with MetaCode.
- [Contact](https://metacode.co.in/contact): Get in touch with us to discuss your tech needs or for inquiries.

## Products/Solutions
- **Web Development:** Tailored websites designed to enhance user engagement and drive conversions.
- **Branding:** Strategic branding services to help businesses establish a strong market presence.
- **Service Details:** Deep dive into specific offerings via `/services/:slug`.
- **Project Showcase:** Detailed case studies of our work via `/works/:slug`.

## Pricing
Pricing information is available upon request through our [Contact](https://metacode.co.in/contact) page.

## Resources and Support
Further resources and client support information can be found on our website to assist you with your journey.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** React 19, TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Animations:** GSAP, Framer Motion
- **3D Graphics:** Three.js (React Three Fiber)
- **Routing:** React Router 7
- **Bundler:** Vite

## Company Information
MetaCode is dedicated to delivering exceptional digital solutions to help businesses thrive in a competitive environment.

## Legal Information
For legal details regarding our services, please refer to our Terms and Privacy Policy on the relevant sections of our website.
